site.title: Portfolio | Full-Stack Developer
site.description: AI-Powered Full-Stack Developer specialized in Next.js, TypeScript and modern web solutions

hero.name: Rayan Sekkat
hero.title: AI-Powered Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: Crafting modern web solutions with Next.js, TypeScript and cutting-edge technologies. I turn your ideas into high-performance, scalable applications.

biography.intro: As an AI-powered full-stack developer, I combine traditional technical expertise with artificial intelligence to create innovative, high-performance web solutions. My specialty: transforming complex ideas into elegant, scalable applications.
biography.expertise: With in-depth mastery of Next.js, TypeScript and Node.js, and unique expertise in AI integration, I develop applications that not only meet today's needs, but anticipate tomorrow's challenges. My approach combines technical rigor, user-centered design and intelligent automation.
biography.passion: Passionate about innovation and continuous learning, I'm committed to delivering clean, maintainable and documented code. Every project is an opportunity to push back the boundaries of what's possible, thanks to the synergy between modern development and artificial intelligence.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Professional solutions tailored to your needs

ai.title: AI & Automation Integration
ai.description: Implementation of artificial intelligence solutions: LLM, Machine Learning, intelligent Chatbots, and business process automation to optimize your operations.

backend.title: Backend Development & API
backend.description: Creation of robust backend architectures with Node.js, TypeScript and RESTful/GraphQL APIs for high-performance, scalable applications.

saas.title: SaaS Platform Development
saas.description: Complete development of SaaS platforms: multi-tenant architecture, subscription management, dashboards and optimal user experience.

refactoring.title: Refactoring & Modernization
refactoring.description: Redesign of existing sites, migration to modern technologies, performance optimization and improved code maintainability.

database.title: Database Management
database.description: Optimized schema design, migrations, high-performance queries with PostgreSQL, MongoDB and modern ORMs like Prisma.

payment.title: Payment Systems
payment.description: Secure integration of payment solutions (Stripe, PayPal), transaction management, recurring subscriptions and webhooks.

devops.title: Deployment & DevOps
devops.description: CI/CD configuration, deployment on Vercel, AWS, Docker, infrastructure management and monitoring of applications in production.

frontend.title: Modern Frontend Development
frontend.description: Creating responsive and accessible user interfaces with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS and the latest development practices.

security.title: Security & Authentication
security.description: Implementation of secure authentication systems, role management, data protection and compliance with security standards.

optimization.title: Performance Optimization
optimization.description: Performance analysis and improvement: bundle size, loading time, technical SEO and optimal Lighthouse scores.

featured.title: pont-facturx.com
featured.description: Complete SaaS platform for billing and tax compliance management for SMEs and freelancers. Intuitive interface, intelligent automation and multiple integrations.
